Wasiur R. KhudaBukhsh

Home CV Publications Teaching Mentees View on GitHub

Funding

  1. Engineering and Physical Sciences Research Council (EPSRC): EP/Y027795/1 (01/03/2024 - 28/02/2025)

Research Opportunities

I am interested in the following broad areas of mathematics:

  • Theoretical and Applied Probability
  • Stochastic Processes
  • Epidemic Modelling
  • Mathematical Biology
  • Stochastic Reaction Networks
  • Mathematics of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Data Science

If you are interested in working with me in any of these areas, please get in touch with me!

Current openings: Postdoc position

Publications

List of publications available here.

Workshop/conference organization

  1. BIRS Workshop on "Mathematical and statistical challenges in post-pandemic epidemiology and public health", June 15-20, 2025 (jointly with Jessica Stockdale, Sara Del Valle, Joel C. Miller and Grzegorz Rempala)
  2. Satellite Workshop on Chemical Reaction Networks, Gyeong Ju, South Korea, July 6-9, 2024 (jointly with Hye-Won Kang, and Jinsu Kim)
  3. Mini-sympoisum at the Annual Meeting of the SMB, Seoul, South Korea, July 2024. (Jointly with Hye-Won Kang and Jinsu Kim.)
  4. RSS Workshop on Epidemic Modelling, University of Nottingham, October 11, 2023. (jointly with Alex Cox, Fraser Daly, and Lucy Teece)
  5. Mini-symposium at the SIAM Optimization 2023. (jointly with Yordan Raykov)
  6. Mini-sympoisum at the Annual Meeting of the SMB, Columbus, Ohio, July 2023. (Jointly with Hye-Won Kang.)
  7. Workshop on ["Recent Challenges in Mathematical Epidemiology"](https://www.wasiur.xyz/EpiWorkshopSep2022/EpiWorkshopSep2022.html), September 27, 2022. (jointly with Kirsty Bolton and Yordan Raykov)
  8. Mini-symposium at the ECMTB 2022. (jointly with Hye-Won Kang)
  9. AIM SQuaREs project 2022-2024. (jointly with Hye-Won Kang, Lea Popovic, Greg Rempala, Ruth Williams and Felipe Campos)
  10. BIRS Workshop on “Preparing for the next pandemic”, June 12-17, 2022 (jointly with Sara Del Valle, Joel C. Miller and Rick Durrett)
  11. Mini-symposium at the SIAM Conference on Applications of Dynamical Systems, 2021
  12. Mini-symposium at the Annual Meeting of the Society for Mathematical Biology, 2021 (Jointly with Hye-Won Kang)
  13. Invited session at the Annual Meeting of the ENAR, 2021 (jointly with Marissa Renardy)
  14. Mini-symposium at the Annual Meeting of the SMB, virtual, August 19, 2020 (jointly with [Hye-Won Kang](https://userpages.umbc.edu/~hwkang/))
  15. Mini-symposium at the SIAM Conference on Mathematics of Data Science (MDS20), Cincinnati, OH, USA, June 11, 2020 (jointly with [Veronica Ciaconel](https://www.asc.ohio-state.edu/ciocanel.1/index.html))
  16. Contributed Session at the Latin American Congress of Probability and Mathematical Statistics (CLAPEM) XV, Merida-Yucatán, México, December, 2019 (jointly with [Hye-Won Kang](https://userpages.umbc.edu/~hwkang/))
  17. Invited session at the 2019 International Indian Statistical Association Conference (IISA 2019), Mumbai, India, December 2019 (jointly with [Arindam Fadikar](https://www.anl.gov/profile/arindam-fadikar))
